architecture.summary: All changes in RunPanel.tsx (labels, buttons, comparisonDetail rendering) + new verdictLabel() in verdict.ts. No new components, no data flow changes.

integrations.summary: No integrations — purely frontend display changes on existing data structures.

ui-ux.summary: Dynamic pass rate label based on benchmark type, provenance line with model+timestamp, user-friendly verdict labels, relabeled buttons with tooltips, comparisonDetail rendering in case cards.

performance.summary: No performance concerns — rendering already-loaded data, no new API calls.

edge-cases.summary: Handle null/undefined comparisonDetail, missing model/timestamp, zero delta, negative delta, equal pass rates.
